heading: Acquisition workforce authorities
label: 1111 Acquisition workforce authorities
notes: References in TextThe date of the enactment of the Elijah E. Cummings Coast Guard Authorization Act of 2020, referred to in subsec. (b)(2)(A), is the date of enactment of div. G of , which was approved .Pub. L. 116–283Jan. 1, 2021

children.label: A
children.text: designate any category of acquisition positions within the Coast Guard as shortage category positions; and

children.label: B
children.text: use the authorities in such section to recruit and appoint highly qualified persons directly to positions so designated.

children.heading: .—Reports
children.label: 2 .—Reports
children.text: The Commandant shall include in reports under section 1102 information described in such section regarding positions designated under this subsection.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), if an annuitant receiving an annuity from the Civil Service Retirement and Disability Fund becomes employed in any category of acquisition positions designated by the Commandant under subsection (a), the annuity of the annuitant so employed shall continue. The annuitant so reemployed shall not be considered an employee for purposes of subchapter III of chapter 83 or chapter 84 of title 5.

children.heading: .—Deadline
children.label: i .—Deadline
children.text: An election for coverage under this subsection shall be filed not later than 90 days after the Commandant takes reasonable actions to notify an employee who may file an election.

children.heading: .—Coverage
children.label: ii .—Coverage
children.text: If an employee files an election under this subsection, coverage shall be effective beginning on the first day of the first applicable pay period beginning on or after the date of the filing of the election.

children.heading: .—Application
children.label: B .—Application
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall apply to an individual who is eligible to file an election under subparagraph (A) and does not file a timely election under clause (i) of such subparagraph.
